calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-16-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Norman Patel, plaintiff in pro per; Larry Reasoner, defendant in pro per.

The parties placed a stipulation for settlement on the record as follows:Possession and restitution to the plaintiff. Defendant will vacate the premises located at 27 Dashiel Hammett #23, San Francisco by 5:00 pm on June 24, 2004.Plaintiff waives all back rent and damages, and claim re damage to door. Defendant waives key deposit. If defendant moves out on a timely basis, plaintiff will dismiss this action with prejudice within five days of the moveout. Plaintiff shall provide defendant a neutral letter of reference.

Judge Pro Tem Tiela Chalmers; Clerk Craig Blackstone; Reporter Patricia Van Steenberge (218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
